nasb.text: And having spent some time there, he left and passed successively through the Galatian region and Phrygia, strengthening all the disciples.

esv.text: After spending some time there, he departed and went from one place to the next through the region of Galatia and Phrygia, strengthening all the disciples.

cnv.text: 住了一些時候，他又動身，先後經過加拉太地區和弗呂家，堅固眾門徒。

ccb.text: 他在安提阿逗留了一些日子，然后离开那里，走遍加拉太和弗吕迦地区，到处坚固门徒的信心。

csbs.text: 住了一段时间，他又离开那里，按着次序走遍加拉太和弗里吉亚地区，坚固所有的门徒。
